category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Brazil INMETRO compulsory certification and Selo PROCEL energy labelling requirements.

title.en: China-to-Brazil Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Brazil's INMETRO compulsory certification, ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 safety, ABNT NBR IEC CISPR EMC, Selo PROCEL / PBE energy labelling, ANATEL homologation, and IBAMA refrigerant requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与巴西INMETRO强制认证、ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、ABNT NBR IEC CISPR电磁兼容、Selo PROCEL / PBE能效标识、ANATEL核准及IBAMA制冷剂要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與巴西INMETRO強制認證、ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、ABNT NBR IEC CISPR電磁相容、Selo PROCEL / PBE能效標識、ANATEL核准及IBAMA製冷劑要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited certification-body (OCP) assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Brazilian legislation, INMETRO Portarias, ABNT NBR standards, Selo PROCEL thresholds, IBAMA refrigerant provisions, and importer (CNPJ) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可认证机构（OCP）评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴西法律、INMETRO法令（Portaria）、ABNT NBR标准、Selo PROCEL门槛值、IBAMA制冷剂条款及进口商（CNPJ）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可認證機構（OCP）評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴西法律、INMETRO法令（Portaria）、ABNT NBR標準、Selo PROCEL門檻值、IBAMA製冷劑條款及進口商（CNPJ）要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Brazil compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety re-certification to ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 under INMETRO compulsory certification — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted and third-party certification by an accredited OCP plus factory inspection is required; (2) Selo PROCEL / PBE energy labelling under the INMETRO + Eletrobras programme, with energy performance recalculated to Brazilian methodology and minimum efficiency levels enforced; (3) an in-country importer or representative holding a CNPJ must hold the INMETRO certification, since certification is issued to a Brazil-resident legal entity; and (4) verification of the R-600a refrigerant transition against IBAMA / Kigali Amendment controls plus ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-charge limits. Grid voltage (127/220 V, 60 Hz) differs from China (220/380 V, 50 Hz), so electrical re-testing to Brazilian supply conditions is required.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大巴西合规差距：（1）依据INMETRO强制认证按ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24重新进行电气安全认证——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受，须由认可认证机构（OCP）进行第三方认证并实施工厂检查；（2）依据INMETRO与Eletrobras联合管理的项目进行Selo PROCEL / PBE能效标识，能效性能须按巴西方法重新计算并满足最低能效等级；（3）须由持有CNPJ的巴西境内进口商或代表持有INMETRO认证，因认证须签发给巴西境内注册的法律实体；（4）须核实R-600a制冷剂转换是否符合IBAMA / 基加利修正案管控及ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24可燃充注量限值。电网电压（127/220 V，60 Hz）与中国（220/380 V，50 Hz）不同，故须按巴西供电条件重新进行电气检测。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大巴西合規差距：（1）依據INMETRO強制認證按ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24重新進行電氣安全認證——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受，須由認可認證機構（OCP）進行第三方認證並實施工廠檢查；（2）依據INMETRO與Eletrobras聯合管理的項目進行Selo PROCEL / PBE能效標識，能效性能須按巴西方法重新計算並滿足最低能效等級；（3）須由持有CNPJ的巴西境內進口商或代表持有INMETRO認證，因認證須簽發給巴西境內註冊的法律實體；（4）須核實R-600a製冷劑轉換是否符合IBAMA / 基加利修正案管控及ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24可燃充注量限值。電網電壓（127/220 V，60 Hz）與中國（220/380 V，50 Hz）不同，故須按巴西供電條件重新進行電氣檢測。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, accredited certification body (OCP), or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. INMETRO (gov.br/inmetro), ABNT, PROCEL, ANATEL, and IBAMA are the canonical sources for Brazilian conformity assessment, energy labelling, and refrigerant requirements.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.

q.en: Does a Chinese refrigerator's CCC certification satisfy Brazil's INMETRO requirements?
q.zh: 中国冰箱的CCC认证是否满足巴西INMETRO要求？
q.zht: 中國冰箱的CCC認證是否滿足巴西INMETRO要求？

a.en: No. INMETRO compulsory certification requires third-party certification by an accredited certification body (OCP) to ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) and the applicable ABNT NBR IEC CISPR EMC standards, plus factory inspection and ongoing surveillance. Chinese CCC certification references GB standards and is not accepted as equivalent for the Brazilian market; the certificate must be held by a Brazil-resident entity with a CNPJ.
a.zh: 不。INMETRO强制认证须由认可认证机构（OCP）依据ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（安全）及适用的ABNT NBR IEC CISPR电磁兼容标准进行第三方认证，并实施工厂检查和持续监督。中国CCC认证参考GB标准，不被接受为进入巴西市场的等效证明；证书须由持有CNPJ的巴西境内实体持有。
a.zht: 不。INMETRO強制認證須由認可認證機構（OCP）依據ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（安全）及適用的ABNT NBR IEC CISPR電磁相容標準進行第三方認證，並實施工廠檢查和持續監督。中國CCC認證參考GB標準，不被接受為進入巴西市場的等效證明；證書須由持有CNPJ的巴西境內實體持有。

q.en: What is the Selo PROCEL and is energy labelling mandatory for refrigerators in Brazil?
q.zh: Selo PROCEL是什么，巴西冰箱是否须强制能效标识？
q.zht: Selo PROCEL是什麼，巴西冰箱是否須強制能效標識？

a.en: The Brazilian Labelling Programme (PBE) energy label and the Selo PROCEL endorsement seal are administered jointly by INMETRO and Eletrobras/PROCEL. Energy labelling under the PBE is mandatory for household refrigerators placed on the Brazilian market: products must carry the ENCE (Etiqueta Nacional de Conservação de Energia, A-to-G classes) and meet minimum efficiency levels set by INMETRO Portarias. The Selo PROCEL is an additional endorsement awarded to the most efficient models. Energy performance must be measured and classified to Brazilian methodology, not China's GB 12021.2 grades.
a.zh: 巴西标识项目（PBE）能效标签与Selo PROCEL认可标志由INMETRO与Eletrobras/PROCEL联合管理。投放巴西市场的家用电冰箱须强制进行PBE能效标识：产品须附贴ENCE（国家能源节约标签，A至G等级）并满足INMETRO法令规定的最低能效等级。Selo PROCEL是授予最高效型号的附加认可标志。能效性能须按巴西方法测量和分级，而非中国GB 12021.2等级。
a.zht: 巴西標識項目（PBE）能效標籤與Selo PROCEL認可標誌由INMETRO與Eletrobras/PROCEL聯合管理。投放巴西市場的家用電冰箱須強制進行PBE能效標識：產品須附貼ENCE（國家能源節約標籤，A至G等級）並滿足INMETRO法令規定的最低能效等級。Selo PROCEL是授予最高效型號的附加認可標誌。能效性能須按巴西方法測量和分級，而非中國GB 12021.2等級。

q.en: Is R-600a (isobutane) permitted as a refrigerant in Brazilian household refrigerators?
q.zh: R-600a（异丁烷）是否被允许作为巴西家用冰箱的制冷剂？
q.zht: R-600a（異丁烷）是否被允許作為巴西家用冰箱的製冷劑？

a.en: Yes. R-600a is widely used in Brazilian household refrigerators as a low-GWP alternative to HFCs, supported by Brazil's HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (administered by IBAMA). However, refrigerant charge limits and flammability safety requirements under ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 must be met. R134a (HFC) is not prohibited at appliance level but faces phase-down pressure under Brazil's Kigali implementation overseen by IBAMA.
a.zh: 是的。R-600a在巴西家用冰箱中被广泛用作低GWP替代HFC的制冷剂，并受巴西依据《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》（由IBAMA管理）执行的HFC削减计划支持。但须符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24下的制冷剂充注量限制和可燃性安全要求。R134a（HFC）在器具层面未被禁止，但在IBAMA监管的巴西基加利实施框架下面临削减压力。
a.zht: 是的。R-600a在巴西家用冰箱中被廣泛用作低GWP替代HFC的製冷劑，並受巴西依據《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》（由IBAMA管理）執行的HFC削減計畫支持。但須符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24下的製冷劑充注量限制和可燃性安全要求。R134a（HFC）在器具層面未被禁止，但在IBAMA監管的巴西基加利實施框架下面臨削減壓力。
